creator: social@brandongrows.me
text:
Created attachment 250020
Quick cleanup patch.

This is not a new port, so it shouldn't have the PORTREVISION warning. Poudriere and portlint both show just that warning but this patch should be good to go.

Py-game_SDL2 7.4.11 will build properly for 8.2.1 but is missing some new features that Ren'py 8.2.1 needs. Will link a screenshot in the next comment
